baseline.observed: The quick CLI guidance explained limited scans but did not say that total_files counts only visited files when a prompt limit stops traversal.
The behavior list documented scan limits but did not define limited-scan file counters.

selected_candidate.name: Limited scan file-count documentation
selected_candidate.reason: The lazy file-walk improvement changed limited-scan counters from total matching files to visited files, so operator-facing docs should define the JSON and summary semantics.
selected_candidate.success_metric: README.md and docs/CLI.md both state that limited scans report visited file counts, not an inventory of every matching file.

verification.command: rg -n "visited files only|not every matching file" README.md docs/CLI.md
verification.result: PASS: Both docs contain the new limited-scan counter semantics.

safety_controls: Historical evidence files were not rewritten.
No source, tests, or runtime hooks were changed.
